ModMetaData.name: [RH2] Uncle Boris' - Used Furniture
ModMetaData.author: Chicken Plucker
ModMetaData.description:
HSK/CE conversion by CarbineAction. Balanced and converted to work with Hardcore SK, Combat Extended, and Vile's Materials Science. Self-contained — no manual edits needed. Drop in and play.
Removed/disabled (art doesn't match HSK aesthetic): - Beds: Barrack Bed, Officer Bed, Canvas Bed - Walls, doors, fences, embrasures - Brainwash chair (separate mod exists) - Footlocker, Military Crate Dresser, Wardrobe
Changes: - All Steel replaced with HSK materials (Glass, Plastic, Electronics, RuggedMetallic) - Furniture, joy, lighting, and power stats rebalanced to HSK values - Research prerequisites matched to HSK tree - Items grouped into HSK ArchitectSense subcategories - Generator smoke effects via Simple FX Smoke (Flecker) - Mission board RansomDemand removed (faction NullRef bug) - Radio music volumes fixed (audio clipping) - 1.3, 1.4, 1.6 version folders removed (HSK uses 1.5 only)
Credits: Taranchuk - C# coding SirLalaPyon - Building art DanDMan68 - Building art JDS - Building art Jecrell - C# coding Albion - C# coding
